tasks.label: 🧹 Kill Dev Processes
tasks.command: fuser -k 3000/tcp 2>/dev/null; fuser -k 5173/tcp 2>/dev/null; fuser -k 5174/tcp 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; echo '✓ Ports cleaned'

tasks.label: 🛑 Stop Docker Services
tasks.command: docker compose down 2>/dev/null; docker stop neuro-voice neuro-music neuro-checklists neuro-chat neuro-memory neuro-agent neuro-surrealdb neuro-searxng neuro-ollama 2>/dev/null; docker rm neuro-voice neuro-music neuro-checklists neuro-chat neuro-memory neuro-agent neuro-surrealdb neuro-searxng neuro-ollama 2>/dev/null; echo '✓ Docker services stopped and removed'

tasks.label: 🛑 Stop All
tasks.command: docker compose down 2>/dev/null; docker stop neuro-voice neuro-music neuro-checklists neuro-chat neuro-memory neuro-agent neuro-surrealdb neuro-searxng neuro-ollama 2>/dev/null; docker rm neuro-voice neuro-music neuro-checklists neuro-chat neuro-memory neuro-agent neuro-surrealdb neuro-searxng neuro-ollama 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'cargo watch' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'neuro-backend' 2>/dev/null; fuser -k 3000/tcp 5173/tcp 5174/tcp 2>/dev/null; echo '✓ All services stopped'

tasks.label: 🐳 Docker Services
tasks.command: ./start.sh --docker

tasks.label: ⚡ Docker Services (Fast Dev)
tasks.command: ./dev.sh docker-dev

tasks.label: 🦀 Backend (Rust)
tasks.command: fuser -k 3000/tcp 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; cd neuro-backend && DATABASE_URL=ws://127.0.0.1:8000 DATABASE_USER=root DATABASE_PASS=neuroos_secret_2024 OLLAMA_URL=http://127.0.0.1:11434 SEARXNG_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8080 VOICE_SERVICE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8100 MUSIC_SERVICE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3002 CHECKLISTS_SERVICE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 MEMORY_SERVICE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3004 CHAT_SERVICE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3003 AGENT_SERVICE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3005 RUST_LOG=neuro_backend=debug,info cargo watch -x run

tasks.label: 🦀 Backend (after Docker)
tasks.command: echo '⏳ Waiting for Docker services...' && sleep 5 && fuser -k 3000/tcp 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; cd neuro-backend && DATABASE_URL=ws://127.0.0.1:8000 DATABASE_USER=root DATABASE_PASS=neuroos_secret_2024 OLLAMA_URL=http://127.0.0.1:11434 SEARXNG_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8080 VOICE_SERVICE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8100 MUSIC_SERVICE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3002 CHECKLISTS_SERVICE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 MEMORY_SERVICE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3004 CHAT_SERVICE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3003 AGENT_SERVICE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3005 RUST_LOG=info cargo watch -x run

tasks.label: ⚛️ User UI (Vite)
tasks.command: fuser -k 5173/tcp 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && cd neuro-ui && npm run dev

tasks.label: ⚛️ User UI (after Backend)
tasks.command: echo '⏳ Waiting for Backend...' && until curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/health > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 2; done && echo '✓ Backend ready!' && fuser -k 5173/tcp 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && cd neuro-ui && npm run dev

tasks.label: 🔧 Admin UI (Vite)
tasks.command: fuser -k 5174/tcp 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && cd neuro-admin && npm run dev

tasks.label: 🔧 Admin UI (after Backend)
tasks.command: echo '⏳ Waiting for Backend...' && until curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/health > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 2; done && echo '✓ Backend ready!' && fuser -k 5174/tcp 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && cd neuro-admin && npm run dev

tasks.label: 🔄 Rebuild Voice Service
tasks.command: ./dev.sh voice

tasks.label: 🎵 Rebuild Music Service
tasks.command: docker compose build --no-cache music-service && docker compose up -d music-service

tasks.label: ⚡ Rebuild Voice (Fast)
tasks.command: ./dev.sh rebuild-voice

tasks.label: ⚡ Rebuild Music (Fast)
tasks.command: ./dev.sh rebuild-music

tasks.label: ⚡ Rebuild Checklists (Fast)
tasks.command: ./dev.sh rebuild-checklists

tasks.label: ⚡ Rebuild Chat (Fast)
tasks.command: ./dev.sh rebuild-chat

tasks.label: ⚡ Rebuild Memory (Fast)
tasks.command: ./dev.sh rebuild-memory

tasks.label: ⚡ Rebuild Agent (Fast)
tasks.command: ./dev.sh rebuild-agent

tasks.label: 🔨 Rebuild Backend (Clean)
tasks.command: fuser -k 3000/tcp 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'cargo watch' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'neuro-backend' 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.5; cd neuro-backend && cargo clean && DATABASE_URL=ws://127.0.0.1:8000 DATABASE_USER=root DATABASE_PASS=neuroos_secret_2024 OLLAMA_URL=http://127.0.0.1:11434 SEARXNG_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8080 VOICE_SERVICE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8100 MUSIC_SERVICE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3002 CHECKLISTS_SERVICE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 MEMORY_SERVICE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3004 CHAT_SERVICE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3003 AGENT_SERVICE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3005 RUST_LOG=warn cargo watch -x run
